one_time_description: Agricultural Benefits Claim settlement with federal government received $135,972,938 in financial compensation, invested through Mikisew Whachask Trust for member per capita distributions
economic_notes: Nation has 13 Government Business Enterprises including Mikisew Energy Services Group, Air Mikisew Group, Mikisew Commercial Trust, Mikisew Industrial Supply Ltd., Guthrie Mechanical Services Ltd., Fort McMurray Super 8 Limited Partnership, and others. Investment in Nation business entities totals $46,610,954. Land claim settled in 1986 for $26,600,000 and 24,000 acres of reserve land across 9 reserves.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors note that condensed financial information for subsidiary business entities accounted for by modified equity method was excluded from Note 5 at instruction of Chief and Council. Financial statements restated (Note 21) due to correction of an error affecting prior year accumulated surplus. Agricultural Benefits Claim settlement of $135,972,938 received in 2018 created Mikisew Cree Whachask Trust; member distributions liability of $66,143,694 remains outstanding. Whachask Trust investments of $57,862,728 recognized on balance sheet with unrealized losses of $7,616,162 (subsequently recovered after year-end). 13 Government Business Enterprises accounted for by modified equity method with total investment of $46,610,954 and current year earnings of $10,265,332. Expenses by program extracted from segmented schedule; expenses_salaries_total not separately disclosed. Legislature expenses $1,917,846; ISETS $623,695; Elders Care Facility $1,507,427; Paspew Place $236,545; Land Claims Members $4,376,260; Land Claims Elders $1,570,033; Child and Family Services $182,725; Special Projects $722,364; Government & Industry Relations $10,445,793; Mikisew Technical Services $7,433,226.
